description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the debian:bookworm Docker image and a global before_script which runs apt-get update -y, installs make sfst python3 python3-pip python3-venv locales git, creates a Python virtual environment with python3 -m venv .venv, activates it, and generates the ml_IN.UTF-8 locale. Define three stages: build, test, and publish. In the build stage add a build job that executes make and publishes the files malayalam.a and python/dist/ as artifacts. In the test stage add a test job that depends on build and runs LC_ALL=ml_IN.UTF-8 make test, and also add a test:python job that runs in parallel for Python 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11, and 3.12 using the docker.io/python:<version> image, overrides the before_script with an echo, installs tox, and runs tox -e py -c python/tox.ini. In the publish stage add a publish job that runs only on tags, overrides the before_script with an echo, depends on build, installs twine, and uploads the dist/* packages to PyPI with the $PYPI_API_KEY token.
